entry.title: Start your SAP Solutions for Quote to Cash Management Learning Journey today!
entry.content:
Get started on boosting your skills today, without spending a dime! You can find all of the following resources at learning.sap.com.

 

Design Principles:
All these free learning journeys include valuable learning content using different kinds of media, such as videos, graphics, animations, system demos, quizzes, etc.. These are the characteristics of the new SAP Solutions for Quote to Cash Management learning journeys:

  • Designed primarily for self-paced learning
  • Tailored setup to fit real learners’ needs
  • Composed for efficient use of our learner’s time

Learning Platform - One-Stop-Shop for all delivery formats
Through different clickable tabs, the learning journey gives you directions on related deliverables (with cost).

  • Passing the quizzes at the end of each unit will lead to a (free) Record of Achievement unless the learning journey is part of a certification track. 
  • The Hands-on Practice area offers you a link to booking options to get access to our training system environment. Most of the learning journeys listed above go along with a hands-on training system. Exercises are designed for any deployment version. As before, learners can use our training systems through Learning System Access. This service requires a valid subscription to SAP Learning Hub, professional edition or solution edition for Finance.

  • The SAP Learning Class part takes you to related classroom offering and all scheduled classroom events.

  • Live Sessions are offered as premium content on top of a learning journey. The learning journey directly takes you to the related schedule. You can register for a session after you log on to SAP Learning Hub, professional edition or solution edition for Finance and then exclusively listen to the speaker and address your questions. In some exceptional cases, sessions are recorded. Please check the comments to this blog to see which live sessions are offered next month. 

  • Join our SAP Learning Group moderated by an SAP Learning expert. Ask your questions about digital learning journeys, prepare thoroughly for SAP Certification exams, and work together with other learners to reach your learning goals.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAL S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance
entry.content:
@jbungay, the appliance can only be deployed on Linux. Edit: there might be a way to get a custom app server running on WIndows (without using the appliance files) but that's pretty much trial&error. If you have a Linux box with HANA running, just add the app server to it as well (performance will not go down significantly). 

Best, Joerg

entry.title: Re: Strange behavior in Decision step for WORKING_DAY in...
entry.content: Perfect, thank you!

entry.title: Re: Change company code from XYZ to ABC
entry.content: Then I would say that there is no magic trick that you can do. You have to follow a sequence where you create a new purchasing organization, reassign master data and roles, and then delete the old purchasing organization. In general, deleting the pr org is not advisable. However, if there is no history of transaction data, it should be possible.

entry.title: Re: Can't find freight order in warehouse
entry.content:
Can you explain in more details where you get the error, that the freight order can't be found? Are you trying to use the Load or Unload Freight Orders App (which is build for WM managed storage locations) also for IM managed storage locations?

With best regards,
Thomas Rösch, SAP SE

entry.title: Re: Quick and effective performance analysis and visualisation
entry.content:
Excellent blog and great contribution. If possible, please update the images as they seem to have been lost.

Thanks!

entry.title: sftp channel error Dangling meta character '?' near index 17 abc_defghi_jkl_??????????_????.unx
entry.content:
Hello,

We are migrating from FTP to SFTP .In current FTP below file name was working fine but in SFTP we get error as below

file name - abc_defghi_jkl_??????????_????.unx

Exception received: java.util.regex.PatternSyntaxException: Dangling meta character '?' near index 17
abc_defghi_jkl_??????????_????.unx

Can someone help with regular expression which needs to be used with SFTP to make this work 

Thanks,
Sahana

entry.title: Re: PS WBS Settings
entry.content: The "project type" is mostly for identification purposes and very little control functions. Please check with your SAP configuration expert to analyze your PS set-up.

entry.title: Re: Change company code from XYZ to ABC
entry.content: Does system allows us to change the company code once it is created even though if we don’t have any transactional data

entry.title: Re: Read BW BEX Query from ABAP using FM RRW3_GET_QUERY_V...
entry.content:
Hi,

Alternative to FM :

Use your query as Infoprovider and get all the data in ADSO. Then you can ready ADSO to get your desire results.

Thanks.

Regards,

 

Anand

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud: Inventory CDS View for SAP BW
entry.content:
Hi @deepak_rai12  and @MKreitlein , Did you find any way to have quantity and value using CDS views? We are implementing inventory management in datasphere but couldn't find standard CDS view for revaluation.

Please help with your findings, how inventory management can be implemented in datasphere using CDS views.

Regards,

Vivek

entry.title: Re: Intraday memo records are not automatically generate.
entry.content: For custom memo record types, define a Z* entry in the configuration activity "Define Memo Record Types " (SSCUI ID 101029).

entry.title: Re: sftp channel error Dangling meta character '?' near index 17 abc_defghi_jkl_??????????_????.unx
entry.content: People would need to know what pattern you are trying to match.

entry.title: Re: How to set role restriction in the Manage Project Demand
entry.content: Hi @beacon1, Can we have a call? I want to see it closely. Regards, George

entry.title: Re: Create a Table with foreign key relationship in Eclipse.
entry.content:
@AbapCatalog.foreignKey.screenCheck : false

Why this is false?

entry.title: PMIS - Planner group analysis additional input parameter
entry.content:
Hi 

Business wants to have additional input parameters in Transaction MCI4 - PMIS _ Planner group analysis app, 
Input parameters are Order type and user status. 

In some SAP notes observed PMIS -planner group analysis report going to update some of table. 

Please suggest on proceeding for enhancement on above parameter will have any impact with future table upgradation.
Also suggest will enhancement logic for input parameter will works for this report. 

Thanks and Regards

Jagadeesh

entry.title: Re: Engineer-to-Order Production with Variant Configurati...
entry.content:
Please refer to SAP Note,

3411622 - How to find details about Engineer-to-Order (ETO)

entry.title: Connexion SAP LBN GTT with SAC possible ?
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to know if we can connect SAP Logistics Business Network Global Track and Trace with SAP Analytics Cloud ?
If yes, can you provide me some details please. 

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements Developer Extensibility Doubt
entry.content: Hi junwu I tried to do it now in my company's environment but the option 'open the SAP UI5 Visual Editor' still does not appear. I am trying to add fields to the 'mdm.cmd.product.maintain' application.

entry.title: Query on running SMIGR_CREATE_DDL in source system
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are planning to perform a heterogeneous system copy for the following environment:

Source System Details:

SAP NetWeaver Release (ECC system):
SAP NETWEAVER 7.5 04
EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 EHP8 FOR SAP ERP 6.0 03 (08/2016)

DB-SID: DEV
Database: Oracle 19.24.0.0.0
Operating System: AIX 7300-01-02-2320
Hostname: eccdev

Target System Details:
DB-SID: DEV
Database: SAP HANA 2.0 SP79.01
Operating System: SLES 15 SP5
Hostname: eccdev

Kindly provide clarification on my below query.

A) Should i execute the report SHDB_GROUP_TABLES_LOAD_BASED before running the SMIGR_CREATE_DDL report in production client of Soruce system

A) When executing SMIGR_CREATE_DDL under HANA options, should we select the following settings?

1.Table Classification
2.Estimated Table Size
3.SAP Business Suite on HANA

Or should we leave it as default ( 1.Table Classification and 2.Estimated Table Size) and proceed with executing the program? Or do we need to remove all the options when running SMIGR_CREATE_DDL

B)According to the system copy guide, could you please confirm if we need to implement the notes included in the attachment of SAP Note 1908075 (REQUIRED_CORRECTION_NOTES.zip)? My system version is SAP NW 7.5 SPS4 ECC instance.

2279106
2264053
2299268
2312217
2324379
2378341
2421685
2347004
2458360
2471909

When I review the notes, they all refer to SAP BW on HANA or BW/HANA, which caused my confusion. Could you please advise me, as my system is an ECC instance?

Regards
Appuru

entry.title: Cost Center-Based Distribution of SAC Stories to SharePoint or Shared Drive
entry.content:
We are implementing a planning workflow in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) for data preparation, review, and approval. Due to a large number of planners, our client wants to minimize costs and has decided not to use SAC's standard planning workflow.

As a workaround, the client wants to distribute SAC stories based on cost centers to a SharePoint site and a folder on a shared drive. The goal is to automate this process to ensure each planner has access only to their respective cost center’s planning data in both SharePoint and the shared drive.

Key Requirements:

  1. Automated File Generation and Distribution:

    • SAC stories need to be exported (e.g., as Excel/CSV) automatically and distributed to the corresponding SharePoint folders and shared drive locations.

Objectives:

  • Find a cost-effective solution to automate this process.
  • Utilize existing SAC features along with external tools (if necessary) for automation and distribution.

If anyone has experience with similar use cases or recommendations for best practices and tools to achieve this, please share your insights!

entry.title: Re: 401 Unauthorized - Build Apps Unable to Access BTP Destination API
entry.content: Hi Dan , Yes i have both forms participant & IRPA Participant roles assigned. In Postman Trigger also same error.

entry.title: Interface from MQ to SAP ECC (webservices) via BTP IS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are planning to build interface from MQ to SAP ECC (webservices) using SAP Integration (Cloud Integration). Could you please let me know what should be receiver adapter that should be used to post the data to SAP ECC using webservices URL? Also if someone has already worked on how would be the sample URL look like? because I would need those info to raise FW request, Cloud connector entries .. I mean https://<<host>>:<<port>> ... I mainly interested on port info (is it 8080 or something else) and this would help me before we start developing artifacts..

 

Thanks

Ramu

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud : Pricing in service Contract
entry.content:
Hi @sanketp,

I would recommend following the scope item Service Contract Management (3MO) to execute the scenario as it contains all the apps required, and the product documentation to review the pricing details:

  • Pricing in Service
  • Price Management

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Re: Enhance FIDCC1 /FIDCCP01 IDOC using exit to change th...
entry.content: Are you able to change the E1FISEG segment value? I am facing the same issue. If yes, can you please help. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud: Inventory CDS View for SAP BW
entry.content:
Hello Vivek, we built our own Custom CDS views for selecting data from BKPF, BSEG and EBEW. I can share the frame here ... just a moment ... you can include the fields you need yourself...

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'YBICDSBKPF'
@EndUserText.label: 'CDS for Exctraktion BKPF'

@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@ObjectModel.usageType.serviceQuality: #C
@ObjectModel.usageType.dataClass: #MASTER
@ObjectModel.usageType.sizeCategory: #XL
@VDM.viewType: #BASIC
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations:true
@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities: [ #SQL_DATA_SOURCE,
                                      #CDS_MODELING_DATA_SOURCE,
                                      #CDS_MODELING_ASSOCIATION_TARGET,
                                      #EXTRACTION_DATA_SOURCE ]

@Analytics: {
    dataExtraction: {
       enabled: true,
       delta.changeDataCapture: {
     automatic : true
         }
      }
 }


@ClientHandling.algorithm : #SESSION_VARIABLE
define view YBI_CDS_BKPF as select from bkpf
{ ...
@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'YBICDSEBEW'
@EndUserText.label: 'CDS for Extraction BSEG'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@ObjectModel.usageType.serviceQuality: #C
@ObjectModel.usageType.dataClass: #MASTER
@ObjectModel.usageType.sizeCategory: #XL
@VDM.viewType: #BASIC
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations:true
@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities: [ #SQL_DATA_SOURCE,
                                      #CDS_MODELING_DATA_SOURCE,
                                      #CDS_MODELING_ASSOCIATION_TARGET,
                                      #EXTRACTION_DATA_SOURCE ]

@Analytics: {
    dataExtraction: {
       enabled: true,
       delta.changeDataCapture: {
     automatic : true
         }
      }
 }

@ClientHandling.algorithm : #SESSION_VARIABLE
define view YBI_CDS_BSEG as select from bseg
{ ...
@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'YBI_V_EBEW'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@ObjectModel.usageType.serviceQuality: #C
@ObjectModel.usageType.dataClass: #MASTER
@ObjectModel.usageType.sizeCategory: #XL
@VDM.viewType: #BASIC
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'BI: Extraction from EBEW'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations:true
@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities: [ #SQL_DATA_SOURCE,
                                      #CDS_MODELING_DATA_SOURCE,
                                      #CDS_MODELING_ASSOCIATION_TARGET,
                                      #EXTRACTION_DATA_SOURCE ]

@Analytics: {
    dataExtraction: {
       enabled: true,
       delta.changeDataCapture: {
          mapping:
       [ { table: 'EBEW',
           role: #MAIN,
           viewElement: ['Product','ValuationArea','ValuationType','InventorySpecialStockType','SalesOrder','SalesOrderItem'],
           tableElement: ['MATNR','BWKEY','BWTAR','SOBKZ','VBELN','POSNR'] },
                      { table: 'T001K',
            role: #LEFT_OUTER_TO_ONE_JOIN,
            viewElement: ['ValuationArea'],
            tableElement: ['BWKEY']
          },
          { table: 'T001',
            role: #LEFT_OUTER_TO_ONE_JOIN,
            viewElement: ['CompanyCode'],
            tableElement: ['BUKRS']
          }
           ]
       }
    }
}

@ClientHandling.algorithm : #SESSION_VARIABLE

define view YBI_CDS_EBEW as select from ebew as e
inner join   t001k on e.bwkey = t001k.bwkey
inner join   t001  on t001.bukrs = t001k.bukrs
 { ...

Hope it helps.

BR, Martin

entry.title: FRUN Technical users Password Management
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

we are enquiring if the passwords for the below technical users of Focused run which were created as part of Customer Network setup and integration of FRUN system with managed systems are to be changed with any periodic frequency or are to be retained with the same passwords that were used during user creation.

 

FRN_LDDS_
FRN_SLDS_
FRN_LDSR_
FRN_LDDS_
FRN_SLDS_
FRN_LDSR_
FRN_LDDS_

 

How to do password management for these users and if there is any standard recommedation/snote/guide for the same.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: FRUN Technical users Password Management
entry.content:
Hello team,

We recommend you to review KBA ##3014282 - Generated Technical Users are locked in FRUN

SAP does not recommend making password changes of that user on a regular basis, a password change should only happen initially as per documentation and if this is absolutely necessary. Before changing the password ensure that all agents of that customer network are correctly connected to the FRUN and FRUN can communicate with all of these agents without issues.

https://help.sap.com/docs/FRUN/6ba510f3be2945e19e497bfb1065b022/58057f4dc35d4d14bac6f47d4bbe3e75.html?q=users&locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Asset Manager - unable to open login page after MDK u...
entry.content: OpenURL function is not used during onboarding. The OpenURL function is only called if used in a rule in the application metadata

entry.title: Change spool list recipient output format?
entry.content:
Hi,

how is it possible to change the format of spool list recipient output for one single job?

At the moment PDF/TXT, but need XML (or XLS).

Thank you

entry.title: IPS Error with SCIM 2
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am provisioning users from Azure to IAS, which works well so far. After that, I provision the users to SAC, but I encounter the following error:

user:34asa-34df-4434f-435f-5fgfgsdfgsfdgsdg,

system=Target - SAC

error=HTTP operation failed invoking https://sac-tenant.com/api/v1/scim2/Users with statusCode: 400, Response: {"schemas":["urn:ietf:params:scim:api:messages:2.0:Error"],"status":"400","scimType":"mutability","detail":"Request is unparsable, syntactically incorrect, or violates schema."},

 content={"active":true,"displayName":"sacfirst, saclast","emails":[{"primary":true,"value":"sacfirst.saclast@domain.com"}],"groups":[{"value":"438b6f2a-5ec4-4d93-b9f6-13cb4ee9502d"}],"name":{"familyName":"saclast","givenName":"sacfirst"},"schemas":["urn:sap:params:scim:schemas:extension:sac:2.0:user-custom-parameters","urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:User","urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:enterprise:2.0:User"],"urn:sap:params:scim:schemas:extension:sac:2.0:user-custom-parameters":{"idpUserId":"sacfirst.saclast@domain.com"},"userName":"sacfirst.saclast@domain.com"}

When I provision the users to IAS, the login name is set as the email address in IAS.

After that, the users are provisioned from IAS to SAC, and the error mentioned above occurs. We found that the error occurs because the login name from IAS (the email address) is transferred to the "USER ID" field in SAC. However, SAC does not allow the "USER ID" to be an email address.

This error happens with  SAP Analytics Cloud SCIM API version 2:

IAS Properties - sac.api.version=2, csrf.token.path=/api/v1/scim2/Users?count=1.

I copied the transformation code from the SAP help page for the target system - SAC.

How can this issue be resolved?

Thank you for your time and assistance.

 

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: 401 Unauthorized - Build Apps Unable to Access BTP Destination API
entry.content: Hello WouterLemaire, I have provided the destination details.

entry.title: Re: 401 Unauthorized - Build Apps Unable to Access BTP Destination API
entry.content: So it has nothing to do with SAP Build Apps. There is an authentication problem. Best to show (1) how you are connecting in Postman; (2) The destination setup; (3) The service key (blurred of course)

entry.title: Re: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_D...
entry.content: We are experiencing the same issue on SAP CPI Neo.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP for developer training
entry.content:
Here is the starter for developers: https://developers.sap.com/mission.scp-1-start-developing.html

Are there any specific services or environments that you are looking for?

entry.title: Re: Change company code from XYZ to ABC
entry.content: no, in OX02 company code is grayed out, you cannot change it, you can only delete a company code and create new one

entry.title: Re: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_D...
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner restrict Business Partner Grouping at creation
entry.content:
This helps a lot to reduce the values in the drop-down per BP Type.

Is there also a chance to set a default group for each BP type instead of having one default for all?

entry.title: Re: My Inbox Fiori App Performance Issue Due Reading unnecessary Work Items in S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_D...
entry.content: Hi, here we are facing the same issue. I open a ticket with SAP.

Hello,

Thank you again for your question. Can you kindly help us clarify which information you're interested in?

Are you interested in extensibility options for payment medium formats? If yes, for which country?

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_D...
entry.content:
Ours was resolved this morning via an SAP Support ticket.  This was referred in the solution.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/inbound-processing-in-endpoint-at-ec-to-erp-master-data-and-org-query/qaq-p/13983391/comment-id/4898890/emcs_t/S2h8ZW1haWx8dG9waWNfc3Vic2NyaXB0aW9ufE01VjdJWTVON0JLVFlCfDEzOTg0NDEzfFNVQlNDUklQVElPTlN8aEs

entry.title: SAP Companion - Duplicate help topics
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Does anybody know how to resolve a problem where editing isn't allowed in SAP Companion because it thinks there is a duplicate help topic? I've checked manager and there is only one help topic in this instance called "Shell-home!whatsnew".

Thanks,

Andrew

entry.title: Re: Auto cash discount the discount will be calculated on...
entry.content:
Hello,

We're sorry but it's not clear whether this post is a question. We're therefore closing it.

Please don't hesitate to open another question. Thank you for your understanding.

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: How can the GP role be made visible in transaction BP?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

The GP-Role “ZBUP03” for Employee is not displayed in transaction BP, although the 'Hide' checkbox is deactivated in Customizing.

How can the BP-Role “ZBUP03” be made visible in transaction BP?

Thank you in advance for your insights and support!

Best regards,
Emal Rahman

entry.title: Re: BAS: BTP ABAP Environment trial services are not loaded
entry.content: Hi there, what happens if you launch the Service Center in Business Application Studio and choose your system there? It should load the services from that system for you. If it is also timing out, then there is an issue with the connectivity in your destination. Would be interesting to see what the service center show. Secondly, if you could also run the command "Fiori: Open Environment Check" and choose this system, it should give you some details on the connection.

entry.title: Re: How to update a RAP object within another RAP-object?
entry.content: actually I was not able to do it yet, will update here once I did 🙂

entry.title: Welcome to our SAP Learning Knowledge Base
entry.content:
This is the perfect place to find articles,  guides, useful information provided by the SAP Learning support team. 
They will help you find answers to questions might arising from your learning at SAP Learning.

Not yet a member? Joining takes only a minute; please follow these steps in order to register!

  • Click on the avatar at the top right of the page to start the process.
  • Enter your information and set up your password.

Now you can sign in and start participating.

  • Click Sign In by clicking on the Avatar icon at the top of any page.
  • Enter your Login name and Password.

Q&A area
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

entry.title: Maintain Inspection types : Config Node Not Editable for Task List Usage
entry.content:
Maintain Inspection type node is Not editable in Config of Public Cloud.

 

Task list 09 is assigned for inspection type 09 and 08, we have a scenario of Using separate task list for both of the Inspection types.

 

Kindly Provide us a solution.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Maintain Inspection types : Config Node Not Editable...
entry.content:
The Standard delivered inspection types like 08 / 09  do not allow the change of customizing as mentioned in the configuration help

You have the possibility to create your own custom inspection type and input a task list usage

entry.title: Re: ETag In RAP
entry.content:
Such a great post. This is a topic that was very complex for me to understand as an ABAP developer, two years ago, when I started creating my first RAP apps.

Thanks for sharing such useful information.

entry.title: Re: Integrate Custom App Into SAP Fiori Launchpad Issue
entry.content:
Issue solved adding this field into IAM app:

Now It´s possible to see Business Catalog and add to a custom Launchpad Page/Space.

entry.title: Difference in the value of the condition associated with the withholding tax between SD/FI document
entry.content:
Hi

I am having a problem related to the amount associated with the withholding tax, that is, on the SD side the amount is correct, but when it creates the accounting document, it makes the calculation based on the total net amount, but it is not what is intended.

In this case, the intention is to calculate the withholding tax based on the value associated with a condition type in the pricing schema and not on the total net value.

In SD, in the condition tables you have the expected value, but when you save it in the FI document it always calculates on the total net value.

I've run several tests and changed the points associated with the basic amount of the F2 (retention code associated with the customer master data that it then pulls from the VK13), such as “Mon.liq modified”, but I still can't do it.

Has anyone had this problem?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How do I fill DMEE tag ReqdExctnDt/DtTm
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Does the following SAP note provide the information you're looking for?

https://me.sap.com/notes/2306111

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Facturación electrónica México CFDI 4.0 error en el "...
entry.content:
No se esta generando correctamente el XML del CFDI que intentas timbrar.

Si no eres desarrollador te recomiendo que lo consultes con tu equipo de desarrollo.

El XML que estas intentando timbrar es un XML de pago para la version 4.0 de CFDI de México pero es posible que dentro de la estructura del XML de pago se encuentre un nodo de mas o te haga falta agregar un nodo.
Te recomiendo que revises el XML que estas enviando y que le preguntes a tu provedor de timbres cual es el error con este XML. 
A demas de eso te recomiendo usar una herramienta para enviar xml de manera independiente y manual como lo son SOAP UI si timbras por medio de servicios SOAP o Postman si es por medio de servicios Rest.

Te comparto ducmentacion del sat sobre el llenado de los xml's de pago.

http://omawww.sat.gob.mx/tramitesyservicios/Paginas/recepcion_de_pagos.htm

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Request (Istanbul, Turkey)
entry.content: My apologies - it seems I missed this request back in December.  I processed all the ones around it.  But I have recorded it now.  Let me speak to the AI person in Europe when she is back in the office later this week and we will be in touch about timing possibilities.

entry.title: LE-TRA versus Transportation Management
entry.content:
Hi,

we (my company) will launch SAP S/4 HANA EWM at one of our customer in the near future.

In the past they use LE-TRA which should be replaced by a SAP Transportation Management (TM) solution for basic shipping at outbound.

My questions:

- What is the successor of the LE-TRA customizing object "Transport relevance" in TM?

        - If no successor is existing, what is the trigger for TM to create Freight units for special deliveries?

- Are freight units needed in any case, respectively what are freight units used for?

- Can I create a street freight order with allocating Transportation units instead of freight units? 

Many thanks in advance for the answers!

entry.title: What are some key considerations, in Mexico, to pay suppliers with multicurrency?
entry.content:
For Mexico payables, what are some key consideration when it comes to pay suppliers billing in USD but they have the receive the equivalent in Mexican Pesos?

Are there any needed changes or maintenance in SAP by Company Code or T-Code level (such as F-53 or F-110)?

entry.title: Calling Analytics UI API from SAPUI5 Application on Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We are currently facing a roadblock while implementing the following scenario:

Scenario:
We are working with SAPUI5 applications running on a Cloud Foundry runtime. Our objective is to call the Analytics UI API exposed by CALM from an application UI service hosted outside the CALM tenant.

Setup Details:
-Trust has been successfully established between the subaccount and the Identity Tenant Service.
-A destination using OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion has been configured in the subaccount hosting the SAPUI5 application.
-Additionally, a trust destination has been set up in the environment.
Issue:
Despite these configurations, when I click the link to access my application on the BTP, I receive a 503 Service Unavailable error when attempting to consume the destination in the SAPUI5 application.

 

Shared Configuration Files:
The mta.yaml configuration (attached screenshot).

 


The xs-app.json configuration (attached screenshot).

 


Could you kindly provide guidance on how to resolve this issue? Are there any additional configurations or steps we might have missed?

Looking forward to your timely support and expert input

entry.title: Re: ServerCrash
entry.content:
Hi!

The log you have shared shows that the ICM process has crashed with a signal 11.

Thus, you should search for SAP Notes delivering fixes for crashes in the ICM on an SAP kernel patch level higher than the one in use at the affected system.

For further assistance, we would need to know the release and patch level of the SAP kernel, and also the "C-Stack" from the "dev_icm" trace file.

Regards,

Isaías

entry.title: Re: Change spool list recipient output format?
entry.content:
In SCOT customizing, there is an option to convert SAP "spool" to attachment types "Output Format for SAP Document"

(e.g. SmartForms to pdf, Abap spool list to txt, etc.)

But

  • you may be required to change the executed report for some ouf your requirements (especially a propriatery format as XLS...)
  • it doesn't rely on one job, but on a range of receiver address
  • BAdI such as EFG_SPOOL_OUTPUT doesn't seem relevant (mass printing)

You should consider adding a last step that would convert output of a previous step to required format and send it to receiver(s)

entry.title: When running Business Objects through a firewall (to RISE/PCE) is logon data in transit secure?
entry.content:
According to the SAP documentation we have to use a request port (e.g. 6401 for the CMS) so that we know the port the firewall needs to open (6400 as well). From what I can see the traffic is TCP or GOIP (General Inter-ORB Protocol). I am trying to understand if data passed to the CMS is encrypted or secured in someway as I have that as a requirement for this project. I need to specify how it is secured, I know it's not using https but cannot find any documentation on what it's using.

Using Wireshark I can see communications between the client (IDT) and the server (CMS) some of which is readable but things like "secEntrprise" which I'm not bothered about but it's hard to validate if the username/password is secured somehow in transit. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESSOBJECTS_BUSINESS_INTELLIGENCE_PLATFORM/2e167338c1b24da9b2a94e68efd79c42/46904c4b6e041014910aba7db0e91070.html?locale=en-US

SAP BusinessObjects - Authentication

entry.title: SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud - Purchase Requisition material price valuation
entry.content:
Hello,

during the creation of a Purchase Requisition on the system S/4 HANA Public Cloud, the system automatically determine the price in "Valuation" tab taken from Material Master Data - Standard Cost (Accounting View) instead of taking it from Purchasing Info Record (even if it is correctly determined in "Source of supply" tab).

I've found the note https://me.sap.com/notes/2057216 where it seems not possible to determine the Price from the Info Record in standard behavior but we should take action on the BAPI ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST, method PROCESS_ITEM or BADI MD_PURREQ_CHANGE.

Is there any standard way to do it?

If not, could you please indicate the correct BADI to modify in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud?

Thank you Regards

entry.title: Purge Users in LMS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
According to your knowledge and experience, do you know if it's possible to purge users who only exist on the LMS side? Is there a tool or a workaround?
Many thanks in advance,
Kind Regards,
Sofia

entry.title: Re: ByD Destination Issue Build Apps
entry.content: Hi gregow. Thanks for your reply. This would be my next step. I needed to connect a Technical User first. Meanwhile I've managed to find a solution by myself

entry.title: ECC6 T-Code VKM3 error, Fill all the required entry fields
entry.content:
Dear All, 

Trying to release Sale order for Credit check in the T-Code VKM3, But getting below error. ECC6, EHP 6. i am SD Consultant. Please help.

Message no. 00055

Diagnosis

You have attempted to update data or start an action. However, not all required information was specified.

System Response

The system could not execute the action.

Procedure

Enter all required information. Fields in which you must enter data are prefilled with a checkmark or question mark ("?") by the system. If the current screen contains tabs, check all tabs to make sure you have filled in all required fields. Then restart the action.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Cannot see community.sap.com attached graphs
entry.content: Same issue for me. Send an email to community@sap.com, they will have a look at it.

entry.title: Re: error while uploading the xsd in Mapping in SAP CPI / SCI
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. I will forward to the experts. Have you already had a look at the following knowledge base article: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2564364? Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: S2S VPN requirement?
entry.content: There is no one unified answer to the exposure of the presentation layer, which theoretically could be some public available website. In case one could define the devices accessing the presentation layer like in a corporate design, that could be regulated via enterprise IdP. Non-enterprise-authenticated access then needs to be restriced at the IdP and the RISE environment having central identity service definition approprietly in place.

entry.title: Re: In custom uploader there is no option to add the section code in the excel file.
entry.content: Hello, Thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Planned Delivery Date does not update from WM to ERP - Inbound Delivery - S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
If you change a planned delivery date on a PO - Inbound delivery via Change Inbound Deliveries - Deliveries. It does not update the ERP side's Planned Delivery Date. I assume this is not intended as this will have further impacts on MRP such as Manage Material Coverage app. What would be the standard solution for this? Delete the delivery and create new?

We are using Ariba so deleting an inbound delivery and creating new would not be ideal.

 

See Delivery from WM side, via Change Inbound Deliveries - Deliveries. Planned Delivery Date has been changed.

See Delivery Date from ERP side via VL32N (Not updated).

entry.title: Re: Categorize Time Valuation Counter in 3 groups using time collector
entry.content: Have you looked at using Counted Events?

entry.title: Re: ME5A enhancement for new field
entry.content: For recent viewers, consider BAdi ME_CHANGE_OUTTAB_CUS and no longuer Enhancement Spot ES_SAPFM06B 😉 for dynamic calculated fields

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Working with HANA CV / MDS Cubes. Do not see any addi...

In SAC when creating a live data model and selecting this MDS Cube I still see just the private members and the two table names ZAC_CVP_D_CONT_ACCT_T and ZAC_CVP_PREMISE_T. I do not see listed any of the attributes of these shared dimensions. I also see a "CustomDimension2" entry in the All Dimensions list. So in essence, I am seeing the same dimensions that were shown on the MDS Cube panel in the HANA CV.

entry.title: Error in standard tpm iflow after 2.4.1 update
entry.content:
Hi All,

Recently I have updated the Trading Partner Management package to 2.4.1 version. Now I'm facing an error in Step 1b iflow of standard package while processing the inbound and outbound messages. 

I'm getting the following error in step 1b iflow:

org.apache.camel.ResolveEndpointFailedException: Failed to resolve endpoint: xslt://?output=bytes&saxon=true&saxonExtensionFunctions=%23xsltExtensionsV11&transformerFactory=%23saxoneeTransformer&uriResolverFactory=%23xsltUriResolverFactory due to: Path of the XSLT Mapping is empty, cause: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Path of the XSLT Mapping is empty

 

Can anyone provide me a solution for this issue?

Thanks,

Aditya

entry.title: Re: Change document types in Free Form Payment
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Mass download online W2 forms?
entry.content: We know that we can view and print individual forms for those who elected online, but is there a way to print multiple forms? We are able to store the printed paper forms on Laserfiche, but we haven’t figured out if there is a way to do something similar for online forms. I have checked t-code PC00_M10_ONW2 (program RPUPAYUS_ONLINE_W2_DISPLAY), but can’t find how to download all of the online forms. If I select all, display selected pdf and go to print, this only prints the first page. Is there a way to save all of these forms to a spool? Or get the forms from PU19 somehow? We are considering moving to another ERP system, and want to make sure we don't lose these forms. Of course, we will make it a requirement for the new system to bring them over, but just in case.

entry.title: Determining which tables are required to recreate data in t-codes
entry.content:
I am a "non-technical" super user trying to communicate with our backend team about what fields/tables I need replicated from ECC to Azure. I will be using the information in Azure to build dashboards in PowerBI.

I am currently trying to replicate MB5B. When I go to technical data for the individual fields, I see
MBEW - Plant
MARA - Material, Base Unit of Measure
MSEG - Receipt, Issue, Current Quantities & Value
T001 - Currency 

However in doing some research online, I saw this post: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/mb5b-tables-for-se16-download/qaq-p/7732455

It references a variety of other tables. Are these dependencies? How can I get this information on my own?

Is using the "technical information" the best way to get the underlying tables as someone who does not have access to SE16?

How do I find out what tables are used to make a structure, like in the case of RFPOSXEXT which is the structure displaying information in FBL3N?

entry.title: IW37N how to generate a report with multiple Partner Function (vendor) entries?
entry.content:
I am trying to run an IW37N report that includes multiple Vendor numbers:

IW37N Partner Function

I seem to be only able to generate/search by one Vendor code at a time.

Any way to achieve this? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: MC.9 Regenerate Info structure
entry.content: Alguien sabe si se resolvió y cómo?

entry.title: Re: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_D...
entry.content: Hi JaredF, could you please let us how it was resolved. Implementing a fix provided by SAP?

entry.title: Re: Date getting stuck in story reports data queries
entry.content:
Hi AislingC,

Could be down to the settings in the Tools section of the Story report.

1. Go to Tools, and click on the query title (e. g., 'Job Information').

2. Check if the box 'Keep last saved values for dynamic variables' is ticked. If it is untick it and save the report.

I hope this helps.

Thank you,

Zaklin

entry.title: how to create a file excel .xlsx
entry.content:
hi,

is there a way to create a .xlsx from a report abap?

Without using libraries, so using FM or Classes

 

thank you

entry.title: Hana studio / query : Filter by attribute of IO in structure
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to create the new structure for the query.

In this structure , I would like to have a filter by attribute.

For IO "0WBS_ELEMT",for line X,  I would like to make a filter with value 2001 for attribut 0COMP_CODE.

But, I can't add the attribute '0COMP_CODE' because the bottom 'Add' is not active and i can restrict by attribut (see the screenshoot)

Question : how to manage the filter with attribut of IO in query structure

Thanks

Bastien

But, I can't add the attribute '0COMP_CODE' because the bottom 'Add' is not active and i can restrict by attribut 

Question : how to manage the filter with attribut of IO in query structure

Thanks

Bastien

entry.title: Re: Unable to understand the few columns in IGN1 sheet wh...
entry.content:
Hi,

The "Parent Key" and "Line Number" columns in the sheet for the IGN1 table of SAP Business One represent specific relationships between the goods receipt document and its line items:

Parent Key: This is the unique ID of the Goods Receipt document (header). It tells which document the line belongs to.
Line Number: This is the position of each item or detail in the document, starting from 0 for the first line.

 

Parent Key (DocEntry)DocNumLine NumberItem CodeQuantity
101GR0010A00110
101GR0011B0025
102GR0020C00315

Parent Key (DocEntry): The unique database ID for the Goods Receipt document, linking the header and its line items.
DocNum: The document number visible to users in SAP.
Line Number: The position of each item in the document, starting from 0 for the first line.

Hope this helps!
Best regards,
Si mohamed ANDDAM

entry.title: Re: material type with effectivity is not allowed for mul...

entry.title: The SQL Anywhere for PC Platforms page shows up to Windows Server 2022. Anyone tried it with 2025?
entry.content: We will be replacing our SQLA Cluster servers this year (2025). The SQL Anywhere For PC Platforms page only has up to version 2022 for Windows Server. Is there where we should go to, or would 2025 be okay? Should we consider UNIX/ Linus versions? What OS's are others using?

entry.title: SAP AI Core: Consolidate Logs with SAP Cloud Logging
entry.content:
SAP AI Core is the platform for managing AI workloads on the Business Technology Platform (BTP). It is often used to run machine learning workloads and serves as a backend service for applications, such as those built with CAP. Consolidating the logs from AI workloads with the logs of the applications that use them provides an advantage for operations and debugging. In this blog, we’ll show how to send logs from AI Core deployments to the SAP Cloud Logging service for a unified view.

Background on SAP Cloud Logging:

SAP Cloud Logging is a service on the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) that enables the collection, storage, and analysis of observability data, such as logs, metrics, and traces, from environments like Cloud Foundry, Kyma, Kubernetes, and others. By consolidating this data, it provides a unified view that simplifies monitoring and troubleshooting across your applications and services.

One of its key strengths is the seamless integration with Cloud Foundry and Kyma. When the Cloud Logging service is bound to a Cloud Foundry application instance, it automatically collects the application's logs, making the setup process straightforward and reducing manual configuration.

For me the most important advantage is its user interface, based on the open-source OpenSearch project. It provides powerful tools for searching, filtering, and analyzing logs.

Ingesting Data to SAP Cloud Logging:

SAP Cloud Logging offers two primary methods for ingesting observability data:

  1. OpenTelemetry API: SAP Cloud Logging supports the OpenTelemetry standard, a comprehensive framework for collecting logs, traces, and metrics across multiple programming languages. This framework provides extensive tracing capabilities and offers options for both automatic and manual instrumentation. Automatic instrumentation can often be applied without modifying existing code, while manual instrumentation allows for finer control within the codebase. However, in environments like AI Core, which do not natively support auto-instrumentation, one can choose to implement OpenTelemetry instrumentation manually within workloads.

  2. JSON mTLS API: Another option is to use the JSON API endpoint provided by SAP Cloud Logging, which accepts log data in JSON format. This method is simpler to implement compared to OpenTelemetry and is particularly useful in scenarios where a quick or lightweight setup is preferred. Logs can be sent directly to the endpoint via HTTP requests, providing a straightforward integration option. Additionally, tools like Fluent Bit can be configured to forward logs to this endpoint with minimal effort, although this might require adjustments to deployment configurations or Dockerfiles. Alternatively, one can create a custom solution, such as a small Python script, to send logs directly to the endpoint for a streamlined and efficient approach.

In the following sections, I will demonstrate a simple Python-based method for sending logs to the JSON API endpoint, offering a easy-to-copy solution for integrating AI Core workloads with SAP Cloud Logging. I do encourage to look at pre-built alternatives though.

Restriction: Collecting the logs from within the Python Environment limits us to those logs created on the application level, we cannot access some logs generated at the platform level..

Prerequisites:

For the example in this blog we need a) an instance of AI Core and b) an instance of SAP Cloud Logging. Both are services on the BTP and there is very good documentation on how to set them up. For both services we need a service key, you can create them using the BTP Cockpit. After obtaining the keys, let's have a look at the service key for Cloud Logging:

 

{
    "client-ca": "-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\n[REDACTED CLIENT CERTIFICATE DATA]\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----\n",
    "dashboards-endpoint": "dashboards-[REDACTED]-cloud.logs.services.sap.hana.ondemand.com",
    "dashboards-password": "[REDACTED_PASSWORD]",
    "dashboards-username": "[REDACTED_USERNAME]",
    "ingest-mtls-cert": "-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----\n[REDACTED MTLS CERTIFICATE DATA]\n-----END CERTIFICATE-----\n",
    "ingest-mtls-endpoint": "ingest-mtls-[REDACTED]-cloud.logs.services.sap.hana.ondemand.com",
    "ingest-mtls-key": "-----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----\n[REDACTED PRIVATE KEY DATA]\n-----END PRIVATE KEY-----\n"
}

 

It contains all the necessary credentials to ingest logs. The dashboard credentials can be used to log in to the OpenSearch UI. For our example later, we use the ingest-mtls-... credentials, so have them ready 🙂

Cloud Logging Handler:

Now, let's take a look at a code sample for sending logs. I chose to use a logging handler based on Python's standard logging module:

 

from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
import gzip
import os
import json
import logging
import requests

from cloud_logging_handler.secret_utils import mtls_client_cert_from_env, mtls_endpoint_from_env

executor = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=1)

class CloudLoggingHandler(logging.Handler):
    def __init__(self):
        super().__init__()
        self.endpoint = mtls_endpoint_from_env()
        self.client_cert = mtls_client_cert_from_env()
        self.executor = executor

    def emit(self, record):
        try:
            # Prepare log message payload
            log_message_formatted = self.format(record)
            payload = {
                "msg": log_message_formatted,
                "date": record.created,
                "filename": record.filename,
                "level": record.levelname,
                "thread": record.threadName,
                "deployment_id": os.environ.get("HOSTNAME", "")[:16],  # a env variable set by ai core gives us some info on the deployment_id
                "deployment_name": os.environ.get("DEPLOYMENT_NAME", "")  # a env variable set us to give the workload a name
            }
            # Submit the background task to the ThreadPoolExecutor
            self.executor.submit(self._send_log, payload)
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(e)

    def _send_log(self, payload):
        try:
            json_bytes = json.dumps(payload).encode('utf-8')    
            gzipped_data = gzip.compress(json_bytes)    # Convert payload to gzipped JSON
            
            # Send the log to the ingest-mtls endpoint
            response = requests.put(
                self.endpoint,
                data=gzipped_data,
                headers={'Content-Encoding': 'gzip'},
                cert=self.client_cert   # hand in client certificate paths
            )
            response.raise_for_status()
        except Exception as e:
            logging.error(e)

 

I implemented a custom logging handler that sends log data to a cloud logging service over HTTP. This handler is designed to meet the specific API requirements of the cloud logging service, such as gzipping the request payload and authenticating using mTLS.

Cloud Logging supports handling JSON logs with custom attributes, making it easier to filter logs. By default, I included several attributes that are available in Python logs, such as log_level and thread. However, you can also add custom attributes, such as deployment_id or deployment_name for AI Core, to further enrich your log data.

Since the request can take a few milliseconds to complete and I don't want to block the main application flow, I decided to handle the requests asynchronously using a background thread with a ThreadPoolExecutor.

However, there are some potential risks regarding thread safety with this approach. I recommend testing it thoroughly in your own environment, as I’ve experienced crashes when using it with FastAPI. For Flask, using multiple workers can cause issues as well, although it works fine with just one worker. There are additional optimizations that could be made, such as sharing a connection between requests, but for my use case, this solution was sufficiently fast. If you do not care about performance you can also keep it synchronous or even send out logs only in certain time intervals.

A unique requirement for cloud logging in our case is the use of mTLS authentication. This necessitates supplying both a client certificate and its associated key. We retrieve these from the service key of the cloud logging service instance. To handle this, I created a helper function that reads the certificate and key from environment variables and writes them to temporary files for use by the requests library.

 

import tempfile
import os

endpoint = os.environ["CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_ENDPOINT"]
cert = os.environ["CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_CERT"]
key = os.environ["CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_KEY"]


def mtls_client_cert_from_env():
    """takes care of loading the env variables and storing the certificates in a temporary file"""
    cert_str = os.environ["CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_CERT"]
    key_str = os.environ["CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_KEY"]

    # Create temporary files to store the cert and key
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False) as cert_file, tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False) as key_file:
        cert_file.write(cert_str.encode('utf-8'))
        key_file.write(key_str.encode('utf-8'))
        cert_file_path = cert_file.name
        key_file_path = key_file.name

    return (cert_file_path, key_file_path)

def mtls_endpoint_from_env():
    """return endpoint from env variable"""
    return "https://" + os.environ["CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_ENDPOINT"]

 

Make sure to set the environment variables with the values from the service key.

Here’s an example of how the CloudLoggingHandler can be added to any project using the following syntax:

 

import logging
from cloud_logging_handler.cloud_logging_handler import CloudLoggingHandler  # Import the custom CloudLoggingHandler

# Create a logger instance
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

# Set the logging level
logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)

# Add the CloudLoggingHandler to the logger
cloud_handler = CloudLoggingHandler()
logger.addHandler(cloud_handler)

# Example log statements
logger.info("This is an info message")
logger.error("This is an error message")

 

Let's have a look at a full example with AI Core.

Example deployment on AI Core:

For AI Core we go with creating a sample Scenario including a minimalistic deployment.

The template for our endeavor can look like this:

 

apiVersion: ai.sap.com/v1alpha1
kind: ServingTemplate
metadata:
  name: cloudloggingsample
  annotations:
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/description: "cloudloggingsample"
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/name: "cloudloggingsample"
    executables.ai.sap.com/description: "cloudloggingsample"
    executables.ai.sap.com/name: "cloudloggingsample"
  labels:
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/id: "cloudloggingsample"
    ai.sap.com/version: "1.0"
spec:
  template:
    apiVersion: "serving.kserve.io/v1beta1"
    metadata:
      annotations: |
        autoscaling.knative.dev/metric: concurrency
        autoscaling.knative.dev/target: 1
        autoscaling.knative.dev/targetBurstCapacity: 0
      labels: |
        ai.sap.com/resourcePlan: starter
    spec: |
      predictor:
        imagePullSecrets:
          - name: felixdockersecrect
        minReplicas: 1
        maxReplicas: 5
        containers:
        - name: kserve-container
          image: docker.io/bfwork/cloudloggingsample
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          env: 
            - name: CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_ENDPOINT
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: cloud-logging-secret
                  key: CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_ENDPOINT
            - name: CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_CERT
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: cloud-logging-secret
                  key: CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_CERT
            - name: CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: cloud-logging-secret
                  key: CLOUD_LOGGING_INGEST_MTLS_KEY
            - name: DEPLOYMENT_NAME
              value: "CLOUD_LOGGING_SAMPLE"

 

Note: To pass the Cloud Logging credentials to the container, we reference a secret. For more information on how to work with environment variables in AI Core, check out this blog.

Aside from that, this is a simple serving template, which exposes the server on port 8080.

You can create the secret to reference in AI Launchpad as follows:

Don't forget to encode the values using base64. I've included a utility script in the sample repository to assist with this.

With the credentials and template in place, let's take a look at the serving code:

 

import random
import logging
from flask import Flask, jsonify
from cloud_logging_handler.cloud_logging_handler import CloudLoggingHandler

logger = logging.getLogger("SampleAIApp")
logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)

# Set up the custom Cloud Logging handler
cloud_logging_handler = CloudLoggingHandler()  
logger.addHandler(cloud_logging_handler)

logger.info("Init Server!!")

# Initialize FastAPI app
app = Flask(__name__)


@app.route("/v2/predict/", methods=['POST'])
def predict():
    logger.info(f"Request to /v2/predict/")
    logger.info(f"Input Data Recieved, preparing prediction")
    
    prediction = round(random.uniform(0, 1), 2)     # Perform inference using the loaded model
    logger.info(f"Successfully predicted a value: {prediction}")
    
    return jsonify({"prediction": prediction })   # Return the prediction as JSON response
    
@app.route("/v2/hello/", methods=['POST'])
def hello():
    logger.info(f"Request to /v2/hello/")
    logger.info("Hello World!!")
    return jsonify({"world": "hello"})


if __name__ == "__main__":
    app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=8080)    # should not be used in production

 

Here, we bring everything together: we start a server on port 8080, integrate our custom logging handler, and expose a few sample endpoints. Additionally, we use the logging module extensively to generate some sample logs.

Wrapping it into a Docker container concludes our development efforts:

 

FROM python:3.7 as base

COPY requirements.txt requirements.txt
RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt


FROM base as final
#
# Creates directory within your Docker image
RUN mkdir -p /app/src/
RUN mkdir -p /app/model/
RUN mkdir -p /app/data/
#
# Copies file from your Local system TO path in Docker image
COPY . /app/src/
#
# Enable permission to execute anything inside the folder app
RUN chgrp -R 65534 /app && \
    chmod -R 777 /app

WORKDIR /app

# for serving default command
CMD [ "python3", "/app/src/serve.py"]

 

Now we can create a deployment and send some requests to the inference endpoint.

Result - Analyze Logs in Open Search:

Finally, let's take a look at the result. The major advantage of using Cloud Logging is the ability to leverage the powerful OpenSearch UI for querying logs. This improves the developer experience, especially in large-scale projects, as it allows us to use a single tool across multiple environments.

Our logs are stored under the logs-json-* index. In the UI, under the "Discover" section, we can select a timeframe and choose which attributes we want to display:

It looks great! All the different fields we've submitted—such as the message, deployment name, thread, log level, and even the deployment ID are there. This allows us to filter logs by specific deployments, which is really useful.

I must admit, using the OpenSearch UI is far more satisfying than the AI Launchpad Deployment Log viewer 😊

I hope you found this helpful. Checkout the full code example. If you have any questions, feel free to leave a comment!
